step1.title: Name your company
step1.subtitle: This is the organization your agents will work for.
step1.mission_placeholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

step2.title: Create your first agent
step2.subtitle: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
step2.env_check_desc: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
step2.anthropic_key_warning: Claude failed while {{key}} is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.

step3.title: Give it something to do
step3.subtitle: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
step3.description_placeholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...

step4.title: Ready to launch
step4.subtitle: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

errors.test_env_no_company: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
errors.opencode_model_required: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
errors.anthropic_key_unset_failed: Retried with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
errors.anthropic_key_unset_error: Failed to unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and retry.

defaults.task_title: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
defaults.task_description:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work
